text_original: you only have 20-50 free messages. you can only buy a monthly payment to get more. I have to wait 16 hours to continue. stupid
text_zh: 你只有20-50条免费消息。你只能通过按月付费来获取更多。我得等16个小时才能继续。太蠢了。
reply_original: Hi there, I understand your frustration about the message limit and the wait time. Maintaining smart AI involves high server costs, which is why limits exist. We are working hard to find ways to offer more free messages in the future. If you have suggestions or need help, please contact us at support@fantachat.ai. Thank you for your patience!
reply_zh: 你好，我理解你对消息限制和等待时间感到的沮丧。维护智能 AI 需要高昂的服务器成本，这也是存在限制的原因。我们正在努力寻找方法，以便在未来提供更多免费消息。如果你有任何建议或需要帮助，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。感谢你的耐心！
